name: wilson-git-guard
description: Deny force-push at the PreToolUse layer — a Bash `git push` carrying --force / -f / a +refspec (and --force-with-lease, unless SIDECAR_ALLOW_FORCE_WITH_LEASE=1) is blocked. Standalone port of wilson's git-guard. Ships a companion `git-workflow` skill teaching the safe-push convention up front so the force-push deny rarely has to fire.
